历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 30997 → 59564 → 52174 → 47419 → 57177, showing significant fluctuations overall. In 2022, due to adjustments in major groups, there was a substantial backward shift. From 2023 to 2024, it gradually recovered, but in 2025, it shifted backward again to 57177. Over the past five years, it has exhibited a volatile pattern, with the 2025 baseline around 57177. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guangdong was 84 in 2021, 94 in 2022, 94 in 2023, 91 in 2024, and 92 in 2025. In 2026, the plan is 67, a decrease of 25 from 2025, a reduction of about 27%, easing competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranks 74th, with recent rankings stable in the 69–78 range, placing it at the upper-middle level nationally. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is somewhat positive, with a Douyin popularity ranking of 43rd (relatively hot), mainly due to Nanchang University's men's volleyball team winning the championship in the 2025–2026 CUVA University Volleyball League finals, which has garnered widespread attention and positively enhanced the university's overall image. In 2023, there was some discussion comparing admission scores, but the impact was limited. Food Science and Engineering is an A+ discipline (top nationally), directly corresponding to the university's Food Science and Engineering, Bioengineering, and other admissions majors. Materials Science and Engineering, Clinical Medicine, and other disciplines are relatively strong, attracting some interest in related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, etc., continue to have high social popularity, and Nanchang University offers admissions in these fields. In 2026, there are approximately 456,000 Physics Category examinees in Guangdong, an increase of about 3.6% from 2025, slightly intensifying competition. Nanchang University is located in Nanchang City, Jiangxi Province, in the central region, with an enrollment share in Guangdong of about 3%–5% (approximately 92 out of total national enrollment in 2025), making it a cross-provincial enrollment. The willingness of Guangdong examinees to apply for central region 211 universities is generally stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 57177, the significant reduction in the 2026 Physics Category enrollment plan by about 27% (which shifts the ranking forward), the increase in Guangdong Physics Category examinees by about 3.6% (which shifts the ranking backward), and the somewhat positive university reputation, the reduction effect dominates but is partially offset by the increase in examinees. It is predicted that the 2026 minimum ranking for Physics Category will be approximately 48056, with a range of 47556–48556.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 南昌大学医学类在广东省2021-2025年最低录取位次分别为：2021年30997名、2022年60356名、2023年52280名、2024年47419名、2025年57177名。招生计划方面，2021年10人、2 022年18人、2023年14人、2024年19人、2025年16人，2026年计划维持16人，与2025年持平。从位次走势看，医学类整体呈波动下行态势（位次数字增大），2022年大幅下滑后虽 有反弹，但2025年再次跌至57177名，反映出竞争加剧的趋势。2026年计划不变，供需基本平衡，但护理学计划从5人减至3人，而护理学是医学类中录取门槛最低的专业，其缩招 将抬升医学类整体最低位次。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 南昌大学是国家211工程重点建设高校、国家双一流建设高校，综合实力在江西省内居首，医学部（原江西医学院）具有较长办学历史和区域影响力。作为省部共建高校，其医学 类专业在华南地区具备一定认可度，尤其临床医学、口腔医学等核心专业吸引力较强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 近年来医学类专业报考热度持续走高，临床医学、口腔医学等核心专业竞争激烈。南昌大学地处江西省会南昌，虽非一线城市，但作为区域内医学强校，对广东省考生仍具吸引 力。2026年新增医学影像学+人工智能双学位项目，进一步丰富了医学类招生专业，可能吸引更多高分考生关注。广东省内医学招生规模整体稳定，南昌大学医学类在粤招生计划 多年维持在14-19人之间，属于中等规模。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合以上因素，预计2026年南昌大学医学类在广东省最低录取位次约为57377名，较2025年略有上升（位次数字增大），波动区间预计在57090名至57664名之间。建议考生在此区 间内合理规划志愿。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Nanchang University's medical programs in Guangdong Province from 2021 to 2025 are: 30,997 in 2021, 60,356 in 2022, 52,280 in 2023, 47,419 in 2024, and 57,177 in 2025. In terms of enrollment plan, there were 10 students in 2021, 18 in 2022, 14 in 2023, 19 in 2024, 16 in 2025, and the 2026 plan remains at 16, unchanged from 2025. From the ranking trend, medical programs overall show a fluctuating downward trend (increasing ranking numbers). After a significant drop in 2022, there was a rebound, but in 2025 it fell again to 57,177, reflecting intensified competition. The 2026 plan remains unchanged, with supply and demand basically balanced, but the nursing program plan is reduced from 5 to 3 students. Since nursing is the program with the lowest admission threshold among medical programs, its reduction will raise the overall minimum ranking for medical programs.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanchang University is a key national university under the 211 Project and a national Double First-Class construction university. Its comprehensive strength ranks first in Jiangxi Province. The Medical Department (formerly Jiangxi Medical College) has a long history of running schools and regional influence. As a province-ministry co-built university, its medical programs have a certain degree of recognition in the South China region, especially core programs like clinical medicine and stomatology, which are highly attractive.

专业热度与地域.title: Program Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical programs has continued to rise, with core programs like clinical medicine and stomatology facing fierce competition. Nanchang University is located in Nanchang, the capital of Jiangxi Province. Although not a first-tier city, as a strong medical university in the region, it still attracts Guangdong Province candidates. In 2026, a new dual-degree program in Medical Imaging + Artificial Intelligence will be added, further enriching the medical programs offered and potentially attracting more high-scoring candidates. The overall scale of medical enrollment in Guangdong Province is stable, and Nanchang University's medical programs have maintained an enrollment plan of 14-19 students in Guangdong for many years, which is a medium scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the above factors, it is estimated that the minimum admission ranking for Nanchang University's medical programs in Guangdong Province in 2026 will be approximately 57,377, slightly higher (increasing ranking number) than in 2025, with a fluctuation range expected between 57,090 and 57,664. Candidates are advised to plan their preferences reasonably within this range.
